commit.subject: LU-3285 mdc: glimpse optimization for DoM files
commit.message:
LU-3285 mdc: glimpse optimization for DoM files

MDT does the glimpse in advance and returns size along with
other attributes to avoid the consequent glimpse.

Test-Parameters: mdssizegb=20 testlist=sanity-dom,dom-performance
Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mike.pershin@intel.com>
Change-Id: I54e060dba3bf6ff742021d9d0ac4ea6c7bdecbb1
